HeroSection.title: The ecosystem that unifies telecommunications, taxation and sustainability
HeroSection.subtitle: Tax automation, magnetic technology, telecom sales and regulatory compliance on a single corporate-grade platform.

FeaturesSection.subtitle: 9 integrated modules under a single digital ecosystem designed for the Venezuelan market.

features.title: VEN-NIF Accounting
features.description: Digital books, RIPF, automated IVA, ISLR and IGTF declarations sealed with the SENIAT stamp.

features.title: HR & Payroll
features.description: Payroll calculation with SSO, FAOV, LPH, bonuses, severance and LOPCYMAT. Full LOTTT compliance.

features.title: Telecom 5G / eSIM
features.description: Physical and eSIM line provisioning, corporate fleet management, usage control and real-time telemetry.

features.title: Artificial Intelligence
features.description: Gemini 2.0 Flash integrated. Contract generation, tax analysis, AI pitch, waste classification and more.

features.title: Legal AI & Permits
features.description: Contracts, notarial powers, CONATEL, SENIAT permits and Official Gazette updated automatically.

features.title: Ameru — Eco-Credits
features.description: AI-powered waste classification, certified eco-credit generation and sustainability marketplace.

features.title: Dashboard & Analytics
features.description: Real-time KPIs, cash flow analysis, financial projections and PDF/PowerPoint reports.

features.title: Tax Management
features.description: IVA, ISLR, IGTF, parafiscal, municipal, withholdings and automated tax calendar.

features.title: Advanced Security
features.description: Cryptographic sealing, immutable audit log and AES-256 encryption across the entire corporate platform.

AboutUsSection.subtitle: We develop software engineering designed for operational excellence.
AboutUsSection.mission_text: To guarantee business management through secure, transparent and immutable records.
AboutUsSection.vision_text: To consolidate ourselves as the global standard of efficiency for cutting-edge companies and institutions.

testimonials.text: Our platform has eliminated the risk of document loss. Secure record-keeping is the guarantee the private sector needed.
Process automation allows us to manage large-scale projects with professional efficiency never before seen in the region.

FaqSection.subtitle: We address the most common questions about the platform so you can make decisions with confidence.

items.question: How do you guarantee Venezuelan tax compliance?
items.answer: System Kyron monitors the Official Gazette daily with AI. All IVA 16%, IGTF 3% and ISLR 34% declarations are calculated automatically according to current VEN-NIF regulations. Legal updates are deployed without user intervention.

items.question: Can I manage multiple companies or a holding?
items.answer: Yes. The Partners and Directors portal allows consolidating the accounting of multiple entities in a single Command Center. Each company maintains its own data independence with group-level reports available in real time.

items.question: How does the BCV rate work in invoices and payments?
items.answer: The Bank of Venezuela rate is automatically updated on the platform. Each invoice and transaction in bolivars automatically generates its USD equivalent applying the current BCV rate, facilitating IGTF 3% compliance.

items.question: Is it difficult to migrate my data from another system?
items.answer: No. Our team guides the bulk import of historical data. For most standard systems (Excel, Profit, Mónica), migration is completed in less than 48 hours at no additional cost.

items.question: Does the Telecom module work with Venezuelan operators?
items.answer: Yes. The Telecommunications portal manages Movilnet, Digitel and Movistar lines, including eSIM activation, 5G provisioning and corporate fleet management by department with configurable usage limits.

items.question: What are Ameru AI Eco-Credits?
items.answer: Ameru is our sustainability module. It allows waste classification using artificial intelligence, generates certified eco-credits for each kilogram recycled, and lets you participate in the Kyron eco-credit marketplace to monetize environmental impact.

items.question: What is the security level of the platform?
items.answer: All information is encrypted with AES-256. Authentication uses JWT with HTTP-only cookies and 7-day sessions. The audit log is immutable and every action is recorded with timestamp, IP and responsible user.

items.question: How does registration for individuals vs. companies work?
items.answer: Registration differentiates between natural persons (ID, personal data) and legal persons (RIF, company name, legal representative). Each type unlocks the corresponding modules: civil documents for individuals, accounting and payroll for companies.
